entity_candidates.definition: Rio de Janeiro is a city in Brazil, founded in 1565, that serves as the capital of the state of Rio de Janeiro. It is the second‑most‑populous city in Brazil and the sixth‑most‑populous in the Americas. Historically, it was the capital of the State of Brazil, the Empire of Brazil, and republican Brazil until 1960, when the national capital moved to Brasília.
